title: Uragoga stenantha
taxonomy: Uragoga stenantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has a classification under the plant kingdom. The plant is further classified into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, the clade Eudicots, and the order Gentianales. This classification is based on its characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. The genus Uragoga is part of the family Apocynaceae, which contains about 2,000 species of flowering plants.
